creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #1)

Hi,

I just sent patch to guessit.

subliminal also needs devel/py-rebulk 2 version installed to work. I sent a patch too rebulk too: PR 246544 ( https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246544 )

Yours,

Nuno Teixeira
